title: rottlera moluccana
intro: Rottlera moluccana, also known as the Java stinkwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rottlera moluccana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
